notes: So far I played tutorial, game seems to run just fine, except there's no music (but there are sounds). I can't say if this issue exists on Windows as well - but this is a card game, music is not really essential, so this is not a problem.
title: Through the Ages

notes: Played some online games and some challenges so far without any problems.
title: Through the Ages

notes:
No music (but sounds!), looks a tiny bit distorted. Otherwise perfectly playable without any tweaks!.
What's strange: I have a two-monitor setup and as long as Chrome is running on the primary monitor, the game opens in an unplayable windowed mode. Closing Chrome (or moving it to the other monitor) and restarting the game fixes this!
title: Through the Ages
